summary: The chapter begins with an intense confrontation over a powerful magical ring, where negotiations quickly break down and a fight ensues. One participant reveals that a formidable "Magic Sword" has been weakened by luck, yet confidently asserts their ability to overcome any opponent even without it. Separately, a distressed Kim Ha-Jin appears, distraught over her failed college entrance exam, prompting her concerned parents to arrive. Overwhelmed by her failure and the presence of her parents, Kim Ha-Jin experiences disorientation and questions her surroundings.
key_moments: A conflict over a magical ring escalates to brute force after failed negotiations, revealing a weakened 'Magic Sword' in the process.
Kim Ha-Jin arrives in distress, revealing she failed her college entrance exam, and is met by her concerned parents.
Kim Ha-Jin becomes disoriented, questioning her location and situation after her emotional breakdown.
